{% if not footer_links is mapping %} {% set topic = "explore" %} {% set topic_links = footer_links %} {% include "partials/siemens/topic-links.html" %} {% elif footer_links is mapping %} {% for topic, topic_links in footer_links.items() %} {% include "partials/siemens/topic-links.html" %} {% endfor %} {% endif %}
